challenges.title: Multilingual Page
challenges.description: Create an HTML page with the lang attribute set to English on the html element. Include a paragraph that contains a span with a different lang attribute (e.g., French or Spanish) to mark a phrase in another language. Assign your HTML to the variable `html`.
challenges.starter_code:
html = """
<!-- Create a multilingual page with lang attributes -->

"""
challenges.test_code: lower = html.lower() assert ' element' assert 'lang=' in lower, 'Should have lang attributes' assert 'lang="en"' in lower or "lang='en'" in lower, 'HTML element should have lang="en"' assert ' element with a different language' assert lower.count('lang=') >= 2, 'Should have at least 2 lang attributes (html and span)' assert ' element'
hints: Set lang="en" on the <html> element for English.
Use a <span> with a different lang value like lang="fr" for French text.
Common language codes: en, fr, es, de, ja, zh.

challenges.title: RTL Content
challenges.description: Create a page with the lang attribute on the html element. Include a paragraph with left-to-right text and another element with right-to-left text using the dir attribute set to rtl (e.g., Arabic or Hebrew). Also add a link element with an hreflang attribute. Assign your HTML to the variable `html`.
challenges.starter_code:
html = """
<!-- Create a page with LTR and RTL content -->

"""
challenges.test_code:
lower = html.lower()
assert '<html' in lower, 'Should contain an <html> element'
assert 'lang=' in lower, 'Should have a lang attribute'
assert 'dir=' in lower, 'Should have a dir attribute'
assert 'rtl' in lower, 'Should include dir="rtl" for right-to-left text'
assert 'hreflang=' in lower, 'Should have an hreflang attribute on a link'
assert '<a ' in lower or '<link' in lower, 'Should contain a link element with hreflang'
hints: Use dir="rtl" on an element to indicate right-to-left text direction.
The hreflang attribute on an <a> tag indicates the language of the linked page.
Arabic (ar) and Hebrew (he) are common RTL languages.
